generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and grandma, I always thought being prepared was just common sense. But now I see how civil defense programs actually protect our families from real threats while keeping our freedoms intact. My neighbor Sarah, who's a nurse, told me how local emergency drills saved lives during last year's unexpected power outages. It's not about fear - it's about smart, practical protection. Why would anyone want to cut funding for programs that keep us safe without taking away our rights? #CommunitySafety #PreparedNotScared
